title: Maciste contro lo sceicco
writer: Gian Paolo Callegari, Alessandro Ferraù, Alberto Manca
actors: Ed Fury, Erno Crisa, Gisella Arden
plot: In the late 1500s, forces of the Duke of Malaga topple the Sacred Obelisk in the North African city of Melida before they're defeated by the local Sheik. The Shiek's men then sail to Spain and kidnap the Duke's daughter, Isabella....
